case.title: WEST INDIA OIL CO. v. SANCHO

opinion.h1: WEST INDIA OIL CO. v. SANCHO, 311 U.S. 615 (1940)
opinion.h2: WEST INDIA OIL COMPANY (Puerto Rico), petitioner, v. Rafael SANCHO Bonet, Treasurer of Puerto Rico. No. 26.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. James R. Beverley, of San Juan, P. R., for petitioner.

Manuel V. Domenech, present Treasurer of Puerto Rico substituted as the party respondent herein in the place and stead of Rafael Sancho Bonet, former Treasurer, on motion of Mr. James R. Beverley for the petitioner.[ West India Oil Co v. Sancho 311 U.S. 615 (1940) ]
